payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Circular wall clock with a white dial and black Roman numerals, black hour and minute hands, set in a dark glossy scalloped frame (likely wood or metal); fully visible in crop but slightly blurred/low-resolution with minor glare on the glass; estimated about 1.5 meters from the camera.
